_comment: Example MCP config for Unity Engine integration. This is a template - you need a compatible Unity MCP server.
_tools_provided: unity_build - Build project for a target platform
unity_execute_csharp - Execute C# code in the editor
unity_get_hierarchy - Read the current scene hierarchy
_setup_instructions: 1. Install a Unity MCP server: npm install -g unity-mcp-server
2. Set UNITY_PROJECT_PATH to your Unity project root (contains Assets/)
3. Set UNITY_EDITOR_PATH to your Unity Editor binary
4. Add this config to your Claude Code MCP settings
